name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little note from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled your subscription with Bright Smile Dental — no pressure at all, life gets busy and we get it.

If you ever want to come back for a cleaning or just a check-in, here's 20% off on us:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days — use it at checkout the next time you book. Our goal has always been to make dental care feel less scary, and that invitation stays open whether you redeem this or not.

If something about your visits wasn't working, I'd really like to hear about it — just hit reply. A real person reads every one.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a gentle heads-up your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Book whenever feels right, no pressure either way :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
